# USBIdlePolicyTypeInterface

**Enumeration Case**

An idle policy that applies to the interface connected to the device.

## Declaration

```swift
USBIdlePolicyTypeInterface
```

## Getting the Idle Policy

- **USBIdlePolicyTypePipe**: An idle policy that applies to the pipe that communicates with the device.
